hours: Monday to Friday, 37 hours per week
shortCompanyReason: Unitemps' commitment to patient care and operational excellence resonates with my professional values. The opportunity to work with a prestigious healthcare practice and contribute to their quality-focused environment is particularly appealing.
shortRoleReason: Manage data quality and IT systems to support practice targets
companySummary: Unitemps is working with a respected healthcare practice focused on patient care and operational efficiency.
roleSummary: Responsible for maintaining IT systems, ensuring accurate data management, and supporting practice performance targets.
headlineAttraction: Lead IT and data quality for a respected healthcare practice
rolePurpose: Ensure reliable IT operations and high-quality data to support practice performance and patient care.
probablePriorities: Monitor and report on practice targets
Support staff with IT and data tasks
advertSummary: My experience in IT management, data quality, and healthcare operations makes me a strong fit for the Data Quality & IT Manager role at Unitemps. I bring a proven track record of enhancing operational efficiency and ensuring compliance in regulated environments.
personalisedIntro: Joining Unitemps as a Data Quality & IT Manager is an exciting opportunity to leverage my extensive experience in IT management and data quality within a healthcare setting. My background in ensuring operational efficiency and compliance aligns well with the role's focus on supporting practice performance and patient care.
whyThisRole: This role is a perfect fit for my skills in IT system management and data quality assurance. My experience in healthcare operations, particularly in regulated environments, positions me to effectively support practice targets and enhance patient care through reliable data management.
coreResponsibilities: Maintain and update practice IT systems
Monitor and report on all practice targets (QOF, IIF, QIF)
Run and devise searches to check data accuracy
Support staff in using IT systems effectively
Submit claims and declare achievements for practice targets
Ensure data confidentiality and adherence to policies
essentialRequirements: Ability to communicate effectively with staff and patients
Attention to data quality and accuracy
Understanding of confidentiality and data protection
Knowledge of health and safety practices
preferredRequirements: Experience with EMIS and Ardens searches
impliedStrategicGoals: Support patient care through reliable data

personalisedContent.personalisedOpening: Joining Unitemps as a Data Quality & IT Manager is an exciting opportunity to leverage my extensive experience in IT management and data quality within a healthcare setting. My background in ensuring operational efficiency and compliance aligns well with the role's focus on supporting practice performance and patient care.
personalisedContent.whyThisCompany: Unitemps' commitment to patient care and operational excellence resonates with my professional values. The opportunity to work with a prestigious healthcare practice and contribute to their quality-focused environment is particularly appealing.
personalisedContent.whyThisRole: This role is a perfect fit for my skills in IT system management and data quality assurance. My experience in healthcare operations, particularly in regulated environments, positions me to effectively support practice targets and enhance patient care through reliable data management.

selectedEvidenceExamples.exampleTitle: Ride compliance and operator progression tracking
selectedEvidenceExamples.whyChosen: This example demonstrates my ability to create compliance-tracking systems in safety-critical environments, which is crucial for maintaining data quality and IT systems in healthcare.
selectedEvidenceExamples.shortLine: I built a compliance-tracking system to enhance safety and operational efficiency.

selectedEvidenceExamples.exampleTitle: Built live operational dashboard concept for GP practice visibility
selectedEvidenceExamples.whyChosen: This showcases my capability in developing tools for healthcare operations, directly relevant to managing IT systems and data quality for practice targets.
selectedEvidenceExamples.shortLine: I designed a live dashboard for improved GP practice visibility and operational insight.

selectedEvidenceExamples.whyChosen: My experience in financial control and operational improvement in healthcare aligns with the role's focus on supporting practice performance and ensuring accurate reporting.
selectedEvidenceExamples.shortLine: I led operational improvements and financial control in a healthcare setting.

selectedEvidenceExamples.exampleTitle: Complex annual projects and team leadership
selectedEvidenceExamples.whyChosen: Managing complex projects and leading teams in high-security, data-sensitive environments highlights my ability to ensure data confidentiality and effective team communication.
selectedEvidenceExamples.shortLine: I managed a team through complex, data-sensitive projects, maintaining high security standards.

personalisedContent.fitSummary: My experience in IT management, data quality, and healthcare operations makes me a strong fit for the Data Quality & IT Manager role at Unitemps. I bring a proven track record of enhancing operational efficiency and ensuring compliance in regulated environments.
personalisedContent.likelyContributionSummary: Based on what the brief describes, I would focus on maintaining reliable IT systems and ensuring data accuracy to support practice targets. My initial priorities would include optimizing data management processes, supporting staff with IT tasks, and ensuring compliance with healthcare standards.
companyHighlights: Prestigious client focused on patient care and operational efficiency.
personalisedContent.cultureFitSummary: My approach to work aligns with Unitemps' focus on confidentiality, quality, and team orientation. I thrive in environments that prioritize safety and equality.
personalisedContent.closingSummary: I'm eager to bring my expertise in IT and data management to support Unitemps' commitment to quality healthcare.
contentNotes: The advert provides a clear picture of the role's responsibilities and the company's focus, allowing for targeted content.
Limited specific company details in the advert; focused on role and sector context instead.
